title: Set up SWR for client-side data fetching with stale-while-revalidate
summary: Install swr, configure a global fetcher, implement useSWR for data fetching and useSWRMutation for mutations, with TypeScript types and error handling.
declaration: I will set up SWR (stale-while-revalidate) for client-side data fetching. This includes installing the library, creating a typed global fetcher, implementing `useSWR` hooks for GET requests and `useSWRMutation` for mutations, and configuring global options. SWR is maintained by Vercel and is well-integrated with Next.js.
